title: गणेश अष्टोत्तर शतनामावली
devanagariText:
॥ श्री गणेश अष्टोत्तर शतनामावली ॥

ॐ गणेशाय नमः। ॐ गणपतये नमः। ॐ हेरम्बाय नमः।
ॐ गजाननाय नमः। ॐ लम्बोदराय नमः। ॐ गुहाग्रजाय नमः।
ॐ एकदन्ताय नमः। ॐ विकटाय नमः। ॐ विघ्ननाशकाय नमः।
ॐ विनायकाय नमः॥ १-१०॥

ॐ धूम्रकेतवे नमः। ॐ गणाध्यक्षाय नमः। ॐ भालचन्द्राय नमः।
ॐ गजकर्णकाय नमः। ॐ वक्रतुण्डाय नमः। ॐ शूर्पकर्णाय नमः।
ॐ सिद्धिविनायकाय नमः। ॐ मोदकप्रियाय नमः। ॐ मूषकवाहनाय नमः।
ॐ ब्रह्मणस्पतये नमः॥ ११-२०॥

[...continues through 108...]

ॐ सर्वसिद्धिप्रदाय नमः। ॐ सर्वमङ्गलाय नमः।
ॐ श्रीमहागणपतये नमः॥ १०६-१०८॥

॥ इति श्री गणेश अष्टोत्तर शतनामावली सम्पूर्णा ॥
benefits: Sacred Ganesha Ashtottara Shatanamavali for devotion and spiritual growth
Invokes blessings of Ganesha in all forms
Traditionally recited for removal of sins and bestows spiritual merit
Ideal for Ganesha festivals and daily worship
description: Ganesha Ashtottara Shatanamavali — गणेश अष्टोत्तर शतनामावली — is a devotional recitation of 108 sacred names offered to Lord Ganesha. Rooted in Ganesha Purana, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Devotees recite this prayer to remove sins and bestow spiritual merit and grant divine protection and auspiciousness. It is also said to invoke blessings of Ganesha in all forms. For best results, devotees chant this on Wednesday (Budhvar) and during Ganesh Chaturthi. With 108 verses and a reading time of about 8 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Ganesha Ashtottara Shatanamavali in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Ganesha Ashtottara Shatanamavali in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn for Ganesha devotion and blessings.
